title: wedelia pseudoviguiera
intro: Wedelia pseudoviguiera, also known as Wedelia or Mexican Tarragon, is a flowering plant species in the sunflower family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The plant is used to treat various health conditions, including fever, diarrhea, and respiratory issues, due to its health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Wedelia pseudoviguiera can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
